result.stdout:
Easy2Work Legacy Modernizer v0.1
Enterprise Legacy Code Analysis Tool

Usage:
  legacy-modernizer analyze <solution.sln> [options]

Arguments:
  <solution.sln>    Path to the solution file

Options:
  -o, --output <file>     Output file path (default: report.json)
  -p, --pretty <bool>     Pretty print JSON (default: true)
  -v, --verbose           Enable verbose logging
  -h, --help              Show help information

Example:
  legacy-modernizer analyze MyLegacyApp.sln --output analysis.json --verbose

Easy2Work Legacy Modernizer v0.1
Enterprise Legacy Code Analysis Tool

Usage:

Options:

  -p, --pretty <bool>     Pretty print JSON (default: true)
  -v, --verbose           Enable verbose logging
  -h, --help              Show help information

Example:
